calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
David Butler, Esq. for Petitioner: Zeray Berhane, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Zebib Gebreslassie, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $5,372.85
Medical Expenses $7,888.98
Costs $619.61
A net balance of $16,118.56 to be transferred to a custodian for the benefit of the minor under the California Uniform Transfers to Minors Act. " UTMA", see scanned doc. for details.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
